ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planning, active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this trial belongs to */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., planning, active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the trial */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this block belongs to */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the block */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the block */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the block */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the block (e.g., planning, active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the block */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the block */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this partner belongs to */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the partner */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the partner (e.g., human, AI) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the partner */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the partner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partner was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partner was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partners_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partners_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partners_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partner this offer belongs to */,
  "offer_value" REAL /* Value of the offer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "accepted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the offer was accepted by the partner */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the offer */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the offer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the offer was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the offer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES partners ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iti_values" (
  "iti_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ITI value */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this ITI value belongs to */,
  "iti_value" REAL /* ITI value */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the ITI value was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the ITI value */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the ITI value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ITI value was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ITI value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iti_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iti_values_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iti_values_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iti_values_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fairness_blocks" (
  "fairness_block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fairness block */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this fairness block belongs to */,
  "is_fair" INTEGER /* Whether the block is fair or not */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the fairness block was recorded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the fairness status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the fairness block */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the fairness block */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fairness block was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fairness block was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fairness_block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fairness_blocks_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fairness_blocks_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fairness_blocks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this participant belongs to */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the participant (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the participant */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant this response belongs to */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this response belongs to */,
  "response_value" REAL /* Value of the response */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the response was recorded */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of the response (e.g., offer, acceptance, rejection) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the response */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action performed (e.g., view experiment, edit trial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)
